title: Web Design Index 2
summary: A couple of websites I’ve built: one for photographer Rankin and the other for my former employer Form, made during my time working for them in 1998/9, are featured in the book Web Design Index 2 and on the accompanying CD. Compiled by Günter Beer, and published by The Pepin Press/Agile Rabbit Editions. Links www.webdesignindex.org www.amazon.co.uk/Web-Desi…
content:
A couple of websites I’ve built: one for photographer Rankin and the other for my former employer Form, made during my time working for them in 1998/9, are featured in the book Web Design Index 2 and on the accompanying CD.

Compiled by Günter Beer, and published by The Pepin Press/Agile Rabbit Editions.

Links

  • www.webdesignindex.org
  • www.amazon.co.uk/Web-Design-Index-Paperback-CD-Rom/dp/9057680262
